privileged_info_summary: The implant_site_assessment task uses a real anonymized dental CBCT scan comprising 100 valid DICOM CT slices (Patient ID: BSP_TEST_001, Study Date: 2026-02-16, Series: Dental CBCT Axial). The task requires assessment of three anatomically correct sites in the lower right posterior mandible (second premolar #44, first molar #46, and second molar #47) using Blue Sky Plan dental implant planning software. For each site, agents must measure vertical bone height (ridge crest to inferior alveolar nerve canal) and buccolingual width. Scoring: 20 pts for .bsp file >100KB, 20 pts for modification after task start, 25 pts for ≥3 measurements, 20 pts for annotation data, 15 pts for ≥2 exported images (>10KB each). Pass threshold: 70/100 points. Minimum image size: 10 KB.
